title: eragrostis xerophila
intro: Eragrostis xerophila, also known as Sand Lovegrass, is a species of grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis xerophila typically involve infusion of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas or tinctures.
